text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the turn of the year, Tamamo Cross
becomes a senior racer. We kick off the new year
with a customary shrine visit...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's lookin' about time, Trainer. This is the year...
We're makin' it happen for sure!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ever since my debut two years ago, I've been lyin'
low and waitin' while I toughened up my body...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But I'm done waitin'. I got plenty of power stored
up, 'n it's cracklin' away inside!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta hit the turf and let this energy fly! Time
to show 'em what White Lightnin' can do!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And then, I'll use all da winnin's to make my
family happy. I'm gonna shower 'em in everything
they ever wanted!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You 'n me, we're gonna make this a reality!
Now let's get some prayers in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our hands pressed tightly together, the two
of us pray for success at the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We finish up our shrine visit and take a stroll
through town...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, it'd be nice to send a li'l somethin' home
now... Y'know, to start the year right.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: How 'bout we splurge 'n get 'em a nice house!
choice_data_list: Our budget probably won't cover that...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ugh, too much? But I wanna send 'em somethin' fancy.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Problem is, I'm bad at pickin' presents, let alone
fancy-schmancy stuff...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What do you think'd be good, Trainer? Could ya
choose somethin' my folks back home'd like?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I'm tasked with finding a gift. I think the
best present for Tamamo Cross's family would
be...
choice_data_list: A photo that shows your growth.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Delicious snacks? Yeah... The little rascals back
home'd be real excited about tryin' somethin'
they've never had before.
choice_data_list: Let's head to the department store, then.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yeah. They've got a whole floor of ritzy gift
boxes, huh? The real bougie stuff... But what the
heck, it's New Year's, am I right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we head to the delicatessen floor of the
department store.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, they got samples out. Let's get some nibbles.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Trainer, it's...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I don't even know how to describe this taste... It's
so fancy I can't tell if it's delish or nasty. Still...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa, there's a sugary kick to 'em! I feel like I
just got charged with enough energy for three
whole races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The gourmet snacks' refined sweetness gives her
an immediate energy boost. These snacks will
probably be perfect for her younger siblings,
given their playful ages.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Showing my growth? How's dat supposed to work?! You gonna tell me to stand on my tip-toes or somethin'?!
choice_data_list:
No, I mean we should take a photo that shows
how far you've come.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, so that's what you meant. A pic to show my
growth as a runner could cheer 'em up, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: C'mon, let's go find some place to snap pics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross and I check out several places in
search of the right backdrop for the occasion.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, the student council office. I bet we can get
a couple nice shots here.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
How's this? I mean, when it comes down to gags,
my zingers beat out Rudolf's puns any day of the
week!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What are we doin' at a haunted house?! I-I'm
comin' down with a bad case of jelly legs
already...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But wait... I'm not the me I used to be... Okay,
time to break out the pearly whites!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We take several progress shots here and there,
and by the time we put the camera away, it looks
like Tamamo Cross is feeling quite proud of
herself.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So like, somethin' you can only find in Tokyo?
Makes sense. They've got all kinds of wacky stuff
for tourists.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The squirts back home'll probably get a kick
outta it. C'mon, let's go take a look-see.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: D-da heck is this?! A panda mask? It's so stinkin' cute...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
They've got a whole kabuki mask set too. If mom
wore this... yeah, that'd make anyone jump.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After going on a spending spree, we put the
various souvenirs together and send a package to
Tamamo Cross's family. Having touched on so
many interesting ideas, our perspective on things
broadens.
